data.name: Fresh Story 3
data.detailed_description:
Fresh Story 3 - is an interactive visual novel about choices, relationships, and finding yourself in the big city.

The heroine's story is reaching its climax. After all her trials, she is ready to take a step into a new life—to choose who to be, who to love, and how her journey will end. Each choice affects the development of events and reveals new facets of her character.

Your decisions influence the plot, the heroine's character, and her relationships with other characters.

The game combines the deep plot of a visual novel with sandbox elements: work, time management, tasks, and freedom of exploration.

Features

  • Non-linear storyline with multiple branches

  • Cafe work and earning system

  • Time-dependent quests, tasks, and events

  • Inventory and items that affect the story

  • Important choices that affect the plot

  • Original music and detailed scenes

data.short_description: The final chapter of the journey is a visual novel about love, temptation, and the choices that determine who she will become.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
